title: App Settings - General - Account - Log in
scenario: Verify that after logging in via App Settings > General > Account, the "Your account" section displays the user's name and email fields populated correctly, while share data remains hidden.
steps: Open the app and tap the hamburger icon to open the menu.
expected: "Your account" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated with the user's name and email address. Share data should not be visible.
